events.headline: SIX VESSELS ATTACKED AMID REPORTS OF IRANIAN DRONE BOATS, SEA MINES
events.detail: Iraq reportedly suspends oil terminal operations after two tankers hit by explosive-laden boats in Iraqi waters.

events.headline: OIL PRICE JUMPS DESPITE DEAL TO RELEASE RECORD AMOUNT OF RESERVES
events.detail: It comes as Iranian attacks on ships intensify in the crucial Strait of Hormuz waterway.

events.headline: UN SECURITY COUNCIL ADOPTS RESOLUTION CONDEMNING IRAN’S ATTACKS IN THE GULF
events.detail: UN Security Council draft resolution demanding Iran end its attacks on Gulf nations was cosponsored by 135 countries.

events.headline: MASSIVE FIRES ON TWO OIL TANKERS AFTER ATTACK IN IRAQI WATERS
events.detail: Two foreign tankers were seen ablaze in Iraqi territorial waters after a strike near the al-Faw port.

events.headline: TRUMP CLAIMS STRAIT OF HORMUZ ‘IN GREAT SHAPE’ AS TANKERS BURN AND OIL SURGES OV
events.detail: Several oil tankers along with a major port

events.headline: UN SECURITY COUNCIL ADOPTS GULF COUNTRIES’ DRAFT RESOLUTION
events.detail: The UN Security Council has passed a resolution put forward by GCC members calling on Iran to halt attacks on the Gulf.
